name: Page Boundary Context Skill
description: Load neighboring boundary blocks for one page or one consecutive page window without expanding candidate pages.

tools.name: page_boundary_context
tools.description: Load the previous-page tail and/or next-page head around one page or one consecutive page range.

parameters.name: file_path
parameters.description: The page markdown file to inspect.

parameters.name: document_id
parameters.description: Document id when file_path is not available.

parameters.name: page_no
parameters.description: Current page number when using document_id.

parameters.name: start_page
parameters.description: Start page number when checking the outer boundary of a consecutive range.

parameters.name: end_page
parameters.description: End page number when checking the outer boundary of a consecutive range.

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: Which side to inspect: previous, next, or both.
